THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARTISAN CREATIVE SOLUTIONS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEATTY PUBLISHING, INC. BEATTY, DENISE $4,503.00 PRINCIPAL, $76.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,579.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BEATTY PUBLISHING, INC. BEATTY, DENISE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT ARTISAN CREATIVE SOLUTIONS, INC. POS WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
